entity.label: Dragon Spring
entity.subtitle: Landmark
entity.description: (Neh. 2:13), supposed by some to be identical with the Pool of Gihon.

nodes.label: Dragon Spring
nodes.description: (Neh. 2:13), supposed by some to be identical with the Pool of Gihon.

verses.text: And I went out by night by the gate of the valley, even before the dragon well, and to the dung port, and viewed the walls of Jerusalem, which were broken down, and the gates thereof were consumed with fire.
